question: Please remove the tomatoes from my sandwich, I'm allergic (not really, just dislike)

history.speaker: client
history.text: Please remove the tomatoes from my sandwich, I'm allergic (not really, just dislike)

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: I don't see any order for you right now. Could you tell me what sandwich you'd like to order without tomatoes?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'd like the turkey and cheese sandwich.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We don't have a turkey and cheese sandwich on the menu. It doesn't have tomatoes and is a great option.
